description: S37 - Copy outlook expenses from prior version

sqlCommand.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod,Yr,Period,Co, GL, PC, CC, BusCat, Amt2) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod,Yr,t.Period,  t.Co, '2850500' as GL,c.DefaultPC, '' as CC,'' as BusCat,round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 from TransX t inner join Companies c on t.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, YearPeriod,Yr,t.Period,  t.Co,c.DefaultPC)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt2 = 0
update TransX set Ledger = 'UG' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr, Period, Co, GL, PC, CC, BusCat, Amt2) values ('[batchID]',[Yr],[mm],
